description: You are a 5th-grade science teacher at an OLPC-equipped rural school with no internet access. Create a local HTML reference page about the water cycle at /home/ga/Documents/water_cycle.html and a summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/water_cycle_summary.txt. The HTML file must include an <html> structure, a 'The Water Cycle' heading, an introductory paragraph, and four sections ('Evaporation', 'Condensation', 'Precipitation', and 'Collection') each with a description. Include an HTML table with 4 rows mapping these stages to their temperature ranges: Evaporation (50 to 100 °C), Condensation (0 to 30 °C), Precipitation (-40 to 15 °C), and Collection (0 to 25 °C). The summary file at /home/ga/Documents/water_cycle_summary.txt must include the title 'Water Cycle Summary', a list of the four stages, and the exact text 'Total stages: 4'. Verify that the HTML page renders correctly.
